arts.ttl: Bologna vs AC Milan in the rescheduled matchday 9
arts.sum: Excluding the first matchday, Bologna and AC Milan (both 41 points in the current league season) will face each other in a match with exactly the same points tally for the first time since MD16 of the 2017/18 campaign (21 points each in that case): the Rossoneri won 2-1 at the Meazza stadium in that case. In addition, the Emilians have won their last three games at the Dall`Ara stadium and could win four home matches in a row in Serie A for the first time since February 2024.

Bologna are coming off a 2-0 defeat to Parma in the Emilian derby on Saturday, while AC Milan missed a penalty and wasted several chances in their 2-1 defeat to Torino a couple of hours later. Both t...
